headline: Capital One’s Discover Deal Reshapes Closed-Loop Network And Governance Outlook
summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) is moving to a closed-loop payment network after agreeing to acquire Discover Financial. The combined business is set to run card issuing and network services in house, reducing reliance on external payment networks. Hedge funds are adjusting portfolios toward COF, while recent insider transactions and new executive pay packages draw added attention. Shareholders are preparing to vote on a proposal that would cap senior executive severance payments following...

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Capital One Financial, Lowers Price Target to $222
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $265 to $222.
